speaker:
FIRST
               
              OUTLAW
text: Come, come, be patient. We must bring you to our captain.

speaker: SYLVIA
text: A thousand more mischances than this one

speaker: SYLVIA
text: Have learned me how to brook this patiently.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              OUTLAW
text: Where is the gentleman that was with her?

speaker:
THIRD
               
              OUTLAW
text: Being nimble-footed, he hath outrun us,

speaker:
THIRD
               
              OUTLAW
text: But Moyses and Valerius follow him.

speaker:
THIRD
               
              OUTLAW
text: Go thou with her to the west end of the wood;

speaker:
THIRD
               
              OUTLAW
text: There is our captain. We’ll follow him that’s fled.

speaker:
THIRD
               
              OUTLAW
text: The thicket is beset; he cannot ’scape.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              OUTLAW
text: Come, I must bring you to our captain’s cave.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              OUTLAW
text: Fear not; he bears an honorable mind

speaker:
FIRST
               
              OUTLAW
text: And will not use a woman lawlessly.

speaker: SYLVIA
text: O Valentine, this I endure for thee!
